entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS THIS MORNING, THEN A CHANCE OF SHOWERS WITH A SLIGHT CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS THIS AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
EAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

A SLIGHT CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
HIGHS AROUND 80
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS AROUND 60
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
